title: Samrat Choudhary Net Worth: 69 Lakhs to 11 Crores in 10 Years, Here's What the New CM of Bihar Owns
description: According to the information available on myneta.com Samrat Choudhary’s latest financial disclosures show a total net worth of roughly ₹11.35 crore. This is a notable jump from about a decade ago when his declared assets sat at around ₹69 lakh.
